scripts.check: biome check . && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pi-provider-antigravity/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pi-session-recap/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pi-toon/tsconfig.json
scripts.prepare: command -v prek >/dev/null 2>&1 && prek install || echo "prek not found — skipping hook install (see README)"
